originalIssuePrice.description: The price that was originally set for that series of preferred stock.

conversionPrice.description: Used to calculate the conversion ratio for the preferred stock into common stock.

conversionRatio.description:
Conversion will be calculated with `conversionRatio` instead of `conversionPrice` if both are entered.

Conversion will be calculated with `conversionRatio` instead of `conversionPrice` if both are entered.

multiplier.description: The multiple of the original Issue price that will be paid out pursuant to the liquidation preferences.

participating.description: Indicates that the holders of that preferred share class are paid out at the same time that the common stockholders are paid out.

participationCap.description: Blank or zero means there is no cap. No cap means the preferred classes are fully participating.
participationCap.title: Blank or zero means there is no cap. No cap means the preferred classes are fully participating

schema_def.description: Share class rights and preferences for a preferred share class.
